src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Replaced raw text socket communication with a structured object serialization protocol using a custom Packet class.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Replaced BufferedReader/DataOutputStream logic with ObjectOutputStream writing a Packet object containing headers and body.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Changed the target server address from a specific LAN IP to localhost.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Changed Socket constructor argument from "172.16.4.134" to "127.0.0.1".

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Switched from a hardcoded port number to a constant defined in the Server class.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Changed port argument from 6789 to Server.PORT.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Adopted Java 10+ local variable type inference for cleaner code.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Replaced explicit type declarations (Socket, HashMap, etc.) with 'var'.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Updated array declaration syntax to the modern style.

src/main/java/maven/Coll.java.general_idea: Added imports for HashMap and TreeMap to support the new collection usage in the main method.
Removed the final modifier from the main method arguments, which is a cosmetic cleanup not required for compilation.
Used the var keyword to declare a TreeMap instance, leveraging local variable type inference available since Java 10.
Used the var keyword to declare a HashMap instance, leveraging local variable type inference available since Java 10.
Added logic to populate and query HashMap and TreeMap instances to demonstrate collection behavior.

src/main/java/maven/Command.java.general_idea: Replace the Windows-specific 'dir' command with the Unix 'find' command to adapt the code for a different operating system environment.

src/main/java/maven/Downloader.java.general_idea: Refactor manual resource closing to use try-with-resources for automatic cleanup of RandomAccessFile.
Replace explicit type declarations with the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference.
Replace explicit InputStream type with 'var' for the input stream variable.
Add explicit 'this' qualifier to field assignments to clarify scope.
Add explicit 'this' qualifier to the count field increment.
Replace custom fatal error call with standard stack trace printing in the catch block.
Comment out the size validation check that previously triggered a fatal error.
Use URI.create().toURL() instead of new URL(String) to construct the URL in main.
Add import for java.net.URI to support the new URL construction method.
Remove unused import for java.io.InputStream since the variable is now inferred with var.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Added import for java.net.URI to support new URL construction method.
Changed URL instantiation from direct constructor to URI.create().toURL() pattern.
Replaced explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables to modernize code style.
Renamed input stream variable from 'in' to 'reader' for clarity.
Renamed output stream variable from 'fos' to 'writer' for clarity.
Extracted buffer size magic number into a named constant for better readability.
Removed the System.out.println statement that printed a completion message.

src/main/java/maven/Main.java.general_idea: Introduce a Java record to encapsulate data, utilizing a feature available since Java 16.
Add import for HashSet to support collection usage in the main method.
Implement a method to print a 2D integer array with box-drawing characters for better readability.
Add logic to calculate the maximum consecutive sequence of 1s in an integer array.
Add empty or placeholder method signatures for future implementation or testing.
src/main/java/maven/Main.java.human_impl: public void draw(int[][] data) {} ... public int max(int[] data, int i) { return 0; }

src/main/java/maven/Main.java.general_idea: Replace the simple ANSI-colored hello world with a comprehensive test harness for the new methods.
Use the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference, a feature introduced in Java 10.
src/main/java/maven/Main.java.human_impl: var main = new Main(); var set = new HashSet<Integer>();

src/test/java/maven/AppTest.java.general_idea: Removed the JUnit 5 test method and its associated imports from the test class.
src/test/java/maven/AppTest.java.human_impl: Deleted `@Test public void shouldAnswerWithTrue() { assertTrue(true); }` and related imports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Add Apache POI library for handling Microsoft Office documents.
Add JavaFaker library for generating fake data.
Add JUnit 3 library, likely for legacy test compatibility or specific test cases.
Add Apache PDFBox library for creating and manipulating PDF documents.
Add MongoDB Java Driver for synchronous database operations.
Add OpenCSV library for reading and writing CSV files.
Add HikariCP for high-performance JDBC connection pooling.
Add JSch library for SSH2 protocol implementation.
Add Apache MINA SSHD core library for SSH server/client functionality.
Add Spring Web module for building web applications.
Add JJWT API for creating and validating JSON Web Tokens.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson module for JSON serialization/deserialization.
Add Lombok library to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Add Jedis client for interacting with Redis databases.
Remove JUnit Jupiter API dependency, possibly replaced by JUnit 3 or other testing frameworks.
Remove JUnit Jupiter Params dependency, possibly replaced by JUnit 3 or other testing frameworks.
Remove JUnit BOM dependency management block.
Remove explicit plugin management versions for standard Maven plugins.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to disable annotation processing.
